title: Replace YES button celebration with WhatsApp redirect

requirements.text: In FinalProposalSection.tsx, update the 'YES 💍' button so that clicking it opens WhatsApp with the pre-filled message 'I said YES ❤️' sent to +918810471387 using the deep link format https://wa.me/918810471387?text=I%20said%20YES%20%E2%9D%A4%EF%B8%8F. Remove the current full-screen confetti/fireworks/hearts celebration overlay and replace it entirely with this WhatsApp redirect. All other styling, animations, layout, and the 'THINK AGAIN' button behavior must remain completely unchanged.

quotes: When someone clicks YES, it should open WhatsApp and send a pre-filled message to my number.
Replace the current celebration animation with this WhatsApp redirect.
Keep all styling, animations, and design the same.

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking 'YES 💍' opens WhatsApp (via wa.me deep link) with the message 'I said YES ❤️' pre-filled and the recipient set to +918810471387.
The full-screen confetti/fireworks/hearts celebration overlay no longer appears when YES is clicked.
All visual styling, hover effects, and animations on the YES button itself remain unchanged.
The 'THINK AGAIN' button still functions as before (cursor-dodging behavior intact).
No other sections or components are affected.

constraints: Do not modify any styling, animations, or design elements outside of removing the celebration overlay.
Do not change the 'THINK AGAIN' button behavior.
Do not alter any other section components.
nonGoals: Adding new animations or visual effects.
Changing any text content outside of the YES button action.
